title: Analysis code for: Machine learning for early dengue diagnosis using routine clinical and haematological parameters: evidence from a prospective outbreak cohort in Munshiganj, Bangladesh
description: Complete Python analysis pipeline, trained model objects, and all figures for the manuscript submitted to PLOS Neglected Tropical Diseases. Six supervised classifiers (LR, KNN, SVM, RF, XGBoost, LightGBM) are trained on 1,018 patient records from Munshiganj, Bangladesh. SHAP interpretability identifies platelet count and WBC count as the dominant predictors.
